title: Test Issue 5
description: No-code test issue with 4 phases to validate kanban board column transitions

phases.title: Verify repository structure
phases.description: Confirm the monorepo structure is intact by checking that all three packages exist: packages/shared, packages/framework, and apps/desktop.
phases.verification: All three directories exist and contain package.json files

phases.title: Verify Tiki state system
phases.description: Confirm the .tiki directory structure is correct by checking that state.json exists and is valid JSON, and that the plans directory exists.
phases.verification: .tiki/state.json is valid JSON and .tiki/plans/ directory exists

phases.title: Verify shared package types
phases.description: Confirm that the @tiki/shared package contains the expected type definitions including WorkStatus and PhaseStatus types.
phases.verification: WorkStatus and PhaseStatus types are defined in the shared package

phases.title: Verify framework commands
phases.description: Confirm that all 7 core framework commands exist: get, review, plan, audit, execute, ship, and yolo.
phases.verification: All 7 command files exist in packages/framework/commands/
